title: digitaria hispidula
intro: Digitaria hispidula, also known as Finger Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Digitaria hispidula include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and treating wounds, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Digitaria hispidula are often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
